title: What the Wix-Base44 Acquisition Means for No-Code
metaDescription: Learn about What the Wix-Base44 Acquisition Means for No-Code and Base44.
body:
What the Wix-Base44 Acquisition Means for No-Code

The recent acquisition of Base44 by Wix has sent shockwaves throughout the no-code app building community. As a leading AI-powered no-code app builder, Base44 has been a favorite among developers and non-technical users alike. So, why did Wix acquire Base44, and what does this mean for existing users? In this article, we'll delve into the details of the acquisition, explore the potential changes, and discuss what's on the roadmap for Base44.

Why Wix Acquired Base44

Wix, a well-established website building platform, has been expanding its offerings to compete with the likes of Shopify and Squarespace in the app building space. The acquisition of Base44 is a strategic move to strengthen Wix's position in the no-code app building market. With Base44's AI-powered technology, Wix aims to provide its users with a more comprehensive and user-friendly app building experience. The acquisition price was reportedly in the range of $100 million, a significant investment that underscores Wix's commitment to the no-code space.

What Changes for Existing Users

For existing Base44 users, the acquisition by Wix may raise concerns about potential changes to the platform. Rest assured, Wix has announced that Base44 will continue to operate independently, with its existing team and management structure remaining in place. This means that users can expect the same level of service and support they've come to expect from Base44. However, as Wix integrates Base44's technology into its own ecosystem, users can expect to see new features and improvements to the platform.

Pricing and Independence

One of the primary concerns for Base44 users is whether the acquisition will lead to changes in pricing. Wix has confirmed that Base44's pricing will remain the same, with no immediate plans to increase costs for existing users. Additionally, Base44 will continue to operate as an independent entity, with its own branding and identity. This means that users can still expect the same level of flexibility and customization they've come to expect from Base44.

What's on the Roadmap

So, what's next for Base44? Wix has announced plans to integrate Base44's AI-powered technology into its own app building platform, with the goal of providing a more seamless and user-friendly experience for its users. This integration is expected to take place over the next 12-18 months, with new features and updates being rolled out regularly. Some of the key features on the roadmap include:

  • Enhanced AI-powered app building capabilities
  • Improved user interface and user experience
  • Increased integration with Wix's ecosystem
  • New templates and design options

Should You Still Use Base44?

So, should you still use Base44 in light of the acquisition? The answer is a resounding yes. With Wix's backing, Base44 is now part of a larger ecosystem, with access to more resources and expertise. This means that users can expect to see even more innovative features and updates to the platform. Additionally, Base44's independence and continued focus on no-code app building mean that users can still expect the same level of flexibility and customization they've come to expect.

Competitor Reaction

The acquisition of Base44 by Wix has sent ripples throughout the no-code app building community, with competitors taking notice. Shopify and Squarespace, in particular, will need to reassess their strategies in light of Wix's strengthened position in the market. As the no-code app building space continues to evolve, it's likely that we'll see even more consolidation and innovation in the coming months.

Conclusion

In conclusion, the acquisition of Base44 by Wix is a significant development in the no-code app building space. With Wix's backing, Base44 is now part of a larger ecosystem, with access to more resources and expertise. While there may be some changes to the platform, existing users can rest assured that Base44 will continue to operate independently, with the same level of service and support they've come to expect. If you're looking for a powerful and user-friendly no-code app builder, Base44 is still an excellent choice. Start Building with Base44 → Try Base44 today and see the difference for yourself.

Frequently Asked Questions

We've compiled a list of frequently asked questions to help address some of the common concerns and queries about the acquisition.

Q: Does Wix own Base44?

A: Yes, Wix has acquired Base44, but the company will continue to operate independently.

Q: Will Base44 be shut down?

A: No, Base44 will continue to operate as an independent entity, with its own branding and identity.

Q: Is Base44 free still?

A: Yes, Base44's pricing will remain the same, with no immediate plans to increase costs for existing users. Start Building with Base44 → Check out Base44's pricing plans for more information.
